name: footballprediction-v451
description: TITAN-V4.51.2 TOTAL-WAR 终极版 - 末端韧性模式 + DOM 备用解析 + 哨兵自动停机

scripts.titan:start: docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec dev node scripts/ops/run_production.js --workers 12 --limit 12000 --session-path /app/manual_session.json
scripts.titan:audit: docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec dev node scripts/ops/audit_dataset.js
scripts.train: docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec -T dev python scripts/ops/train_model.py
scripts.train:fast: docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec -T dev python scripts/ops/train_model.py --estimators 100 --depth 4
scripts.train:deep: docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec -T dev python scripts/ops/train_model.py --estimators 500 --depth 8 --lr 0.03
scripts.predict: docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec -T dev python scripts/ops/predict_pipeline.py
scripts.predict:dry: docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec -T dev python scripts/ops/predict_pipeline.py --dry-run
scripts.predict:json: docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec -T dev python scripts/ops/predict_pipeline.py --format json
scripts.status:db: docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec db psql -U football_user -d football_db -c "SELECT 'L1' as layer, COUNT(*) FROM matches UNION ALL SELECT 'L2', COUNT(*) FROM raw_match_data UNION ALL SELECT 'L3', COUNT(*) FROM l3_features;"
scripts.test:coverage:recon-core: rm -rf reports/coverage/recon-core && c8 --all --include=src/infrastructure/recon/services/ReconDecryptorSourceExtractor.js --include=src/infrastructure/recon/services/ReconSourceProber.js --include=src/infrastructure/recon/services/ReconMatrixTargetRunner.js --include=src/infrastructure/recon/ReconDistributedLock.js --include=src/infrastructure/recon/services/ReconPureDecryptorRuntime.js --reporter=text-summary --reporter=json-summary --reports-dir reports/coverage/recon-core node scripts/test/run_test_suite.js recon-core && node scripts/test/check_recon_core_coverage.js
scripts.lint:md: markdownlint '**/*.md' --ignore node_modules --ignore archive --ignore venv --ignore 'tests/Z_LEGACY_ARCHIVE_PRE_V4.46.8/**' --ignore 'tests/unit/TEST_SUMMARY.md' --ignore CHANGELOG.md --ignore CLAUDE.md --ignore COMMAND_CENTER.md --ignore 'docs/**' --ignore 'src/**/*.md' --ignore MIGRATION.md --ignore MERGE_READY.md
scripts.lint:md:fix: markdownlint '**/*.md' --ignore node_modules --ignore archive --ignore venv --ignore 'tests/Z_LEGACY_ARCHIVE_PRE_V4.46.8/**' --ignore 'tests/unit/TEST_SUMMARY.md' --ignore CHANGELOG.md --ignore CLAUDE.md --ignore COMMAND_CENTER.md --ignore 'docs/**' --ignore 'src/**/*.md' --ignore MIGRATION.md --ignore MERGE_READY.md --fix

author: V174 Engineering Team
